description_long: This is a small, whimsical cake with a roughly conical shape, covered in white icing and adorned with a variety of colorful candies, including round gumdrops, peppermints, and chocolate pieces. The cake sits on a white disposable plate, which is placed atop a piece of brown cardboard decorated with stickers and drawings. The icing appears to be thick and unevenly applied, with some drips and peaks, giving the cake a playful, homemade appearance. Several toothpicks or thin sticks protrude from the top, possibly as part of the decoration or to support the structure. The base of the cake is surrounded by a blue sugary substance, possibly colored sugar or sprinkles, adding to the festive look. The overall presentation is creative and childlike, suggesting it may have been made for a fun event or as a craft project.
description: A small, conical cake covered in white icing and colorful candies, displayed on a white plate atop decorated cardboard. The cake features playful, homemade decorations with protruding sticks and a blue sugary base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake's main face with a prominent red candy, various round candies, and visible toothpicks on top.
description_view_1: This angle highlights more red and green candies, with the blue sugary base and decorated cardboard clearly visible.
description_view_2: Back view reveals a dense cluster of candies and icing drips, with the blue sugar ring most prominent.
description_view_3: Side view displays a mix of square and round candies, with the plate and cardboard surface visible and some stickers in view.
